review_text: The quality of the material is terrible. Started ripping after 2 days.
Delivery was super fast, arrived within 24 hours. Incredible!
Packaging was completely crushed when it arrived. Disappointed.
Customer service ignored my emails for a week.
Too expensive for what it is. I found a cheaper alternative elsewhere.
Perfect fit, exactly what I ordered! Amazing quality.
The delivery package was missing half my order. Angry.
Beautiful packaging, felt very premium when opening.
Product quality is completely underwhelming given the price.
Very frustrated, sizing chart is completely inaccurate. Had to return.
